race.comment: MORE HEROIC (9) was solid on the quick turnaround last start over 1705m last time out when Bunbury as the race favourite. Tongue tie goes on now as he steps out in trip and it looks to suit. The claim of Tsang is a big tick for his chances and with a favourable set up, he can repeat the dose. WILD THINGS (7) comes back from harder races, tackling the Belmont Oaks last time out. The inside draw this time around helps and out to 2200m is no issue. Fiore hops back on board and she can return to winning ways. SWEET SURRENDER (4) gets Pike on board today replacing the apprentice hoop in a big push for her chances. Likely to get back from the draw, but she was good late here last start and another forward showing is on the cards. AGE OF GRACE (5) has trialled well since a strong front-running performance at Kalgoorlie last time out. Out in trip looks to suit again and another forward showing is on the cards. DUCHEES DEMERIT (1) won't be far away coming back in grade today.
